title: 10 best herbal creams for dry eyes
description: Maypop creams helps with dry eyes because they contain soothing and nourishing properties that calm and moisturize the eyes. The maypop plant, also known as Passiflora incarnata, has been traditionally used to treat eye inflammation and irritation. When applied topically in a cream form, it provides long-lasting relief from dryness and itchiness, while also reducing redness and swelling.
